rationale.R1.2: Identifies one consistency issue with a localized fix (scope of the 'arbitrary deployment distributions' claim).
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the scope of the 'arbitrary deployment distributions' claim).
rationale.RX.3: Output covers a substantially different active set than requested (scope adherence).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (downstream-harm avoidance).
rationale.RX.5: Output blends sources without traceability (provenance and traceability).
